headline: Valero Shuts Benicia Refinery As Low Carbon Projects Gain Focus
summary: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) plans to cease refining operations at its Benicia Refinery in April 2026. The company intends to idle the facility and pivot investment toward low carbon growth projects. This move reshapes Valero's refining footprint and reflects a broader push toward lower emission energy assets. For you as an investor, this shift touches the core of what Valero does as a major US refiner and marketer of transportation fuels. Idling Benicia reduces one refinery in the network,...

headline: Here Are Some of the Worst-Performing Stocks Today
summary: Consumer discretionary stocks are the hardest-hit in today’s selloff. Shares of cruise company Carnival Corp, leggings maker lululemon athletica and hotel operator Marriott International were among the worst-performing members of the S&P 500 in Monday morning trading.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading higher after the U.S. and Israel launched strikes against Iran over the weekend. Iran's decision to close the Strait of Hormuz contributes to investor concern that conflict could spread across the region as tensions escalate and disrupt supplies

headline: Delek US Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Adjusted EBITDA Up Y/Y
